work_unit: deep-audit: 分诊流水线+心跳预检+路由健康评分+决策观察+完成度门禁 (core decision pipeline)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after audit-2026-07-03-013 prod-deploy fixes all merged. Triggered new full audit. Selected engine-skills-extracted core decision pipeline (5 skills not previously deep-audited together) as target.
action: Deep audit of 5 interconnected engine skills: triage.py, pipeline-gate.py, studio-precheck.sh, route-health-scorer.py, decision-observer.py + stop-completion-gate.py + autonomous-loop.sh for cross-module data flow tracing. Read 8 source files total. Traced status.json as shared-state single-point-of-failure across 4/5 components.
outcome_evidence: Produced audit-2026-07-04-001.md with 10 findings (3H/4M/3L). Updated audit-cycle-state.json: status=fix-in-progress, 10 derived_fixes pending, 2 new structural debts (SD-ES-001 zero test infra, SD-ES-002 status.json concurrency). History entry added.
next_suggestion: Next round: dispatch ES-H001 (pipeline-gate indirect-exec bypass) as first derived fix — highest priority route-fix, single file change in pipeline-gate.py.

audit_findings.finding: git commit/push detection bypassable via eval/exec/sh -c/$()/backtick indirect execution
audit_findings.remediation: Add indirect-exec pattern blocking or document limitation clearly

audit_findings.finding: inline python3 -c with bash variable interpolation creates shell injection surface
audit_findings.remediation: Use env vars or heredoc instead of string interpolation

audit_findings.finding: confirm_studio_draft uses non-atomic safe_write_json for status.json (same vuln as case-404)
E3 external stability score always returns 2/2 max, dimension contributes nothing
audit_findings.remediation: Implement package version detection or return unavailable flag

audit_findings.finding: E4 git diff failure defaults to full score (fail-open anti-pattern)
--done archive filename sequence number race condition on concurrent calls
audit_findings.remediation: Use timestamp prefix instead of glob count

audit_findings.finding: SD-PD-001/SD-PD-002 referenced but missing from structural-debt.md (orphaned reference)
_DECISION_RE compiled inside function body every call despite docstring claiming single compile
_is_doc_or_meta lacks .claude/ prefix match; engine self-maintained files blocked by own gate
PROMPT string embeds $WORKSPACE via shell interpolation; paths with quotes break syntax
